creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri Dec 20 15:24:45 2013
New Revision: 337024
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337024

Log:
  - Drop maintainership at maintainer request
  
  PR:		ports/185029
  Submitted by:	"H. Wade Minter" <minter@lunenburg.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/games/tornado/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk-FileDialog/Makefile

Modified: head/games/tornado/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/tornado/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 15:03:36 2013	(r337023)
+++ head/games/tornado/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 15:24:45 2013	(r337024)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Created by: minter
+# Created by: minter@lunenburg.org
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tornado
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://kiza.kcore.de/media/software/${PORTNAME}/
 
-MAINTAINER=	minter@lunenburg.org
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	A curses-based game of weather destruction
 
 MAN6=		tornado.6

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk-FileDialog/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk-FileDialog/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 15:03:36 2013	(r337023)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk-FileDialog/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 15:24:45 2013	(r337024)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Created by: minter
+# Created by: minter@lunenburg.org
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Tk-FileDialog
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	minter@lunenburg.org
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Tk::FileDialog - A file selector dialog for perl/Tk
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Tk>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk
